title: Contact | Meg Hillier MP
meta_description: Contact Meg Hillier, MP for Hackney South and Shoreditch.
headings: h3: Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Meg Hillier MP top of page MEG HILLIER MP Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch Home About Meg News Hackney News Monthly Reports Parliament News Committee News Weekly News News Archive Weekly News Archive Contact Advice Surgeries More FAQs Visit Parliament PMQs Ballot More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. CONTACT ME Meg aims to reply to all requests for assistance within 10 working days but sometimes, with very complex cases or at times of peak demand, it may occasionally take a little longer. ​ For enquiries on policy matters, we aim to respond within 10 working days but at busy times we prioritise personal cases and the response time for policy enquiries and write in campaigns can extend. ​ If you have not had a response to an enquiry, please call Meg’s office on 0207 219 5325. ​ You can view Meg's privacy policy here . First name Last name Address Post Code Email Your message Submit Write to Meg You can write to me at: House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Phone Meg You can phone or fax Meg Telephone: 020 7219 5325 Email Meg You can email Meg on meg.hillier.mp@parliament.uk Copyright © Meg Hillier | Privacy Policy bottom of page
